'''Gold 2''' was the designation of a [[BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-wing]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It was flown by [[Tiree/Legends|Tiree]]. The [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] was equipped with custom high-power [[lateral thruster]]s that gave the craft improved maneuverability which allowed Tiree to successfully draw and evade enemy weapons fire.<ref name="CCG-Gold2" />

Gold 2 was destroyed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] as Tiree attempted to provide cover for [[Gold Leader/Legends|Gold Leader]] [[Jon Vander/Legends|Jon Vander]] during the first [[Meridian trench/Legends|trench]] run attempt to launch [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] into the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|thermal exhaust port]].<ref name="ANH" />
